programme.title: 100 latinos dijeron
programme.desc: Dos familias competirán respondiendo a distintas preguntas por la oportunidad de ganar dinero basados en las respuestas más populares, de acuerdo a las previamente respondidas por 100 latinos alrededor de Estados Unidos.

programme.title: El enamorado
programme.desc: Martín, ya retirado de su oficio de héroe debido a su matrimonio con Rosario, debe volver a las andanzas para ayudar a una amiga de unos asaltantes.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: A cynical Alex finds the spirit of Christmas in a dream.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Elyse is shocked by her soon-to-be-divorced mother's quick and free-spirited plunge into the singles world.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex discovers that his idol, young Uncle Ned, has a serious drinking problem.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex pretends to support the Equal Rights Amendment to impress a pretty feminist.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Mallory turns to Alex for some advice when she begins to fear she'll lose her new boyfriend unless she agrees to his pleas for a more "adult" romance.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Elyse is excited at the prospect of reviving her folk-singing career at a local nightclub.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex is so sure that he will be named valedictorian of his class that he can't cope with the thought of being defeated by a girl-especially his girl.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex courts disaster when he invites two dates to the senior prom. He devises an elaborate scheme for escorting each of the unknowing girls on a night to remember.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: When Alex's pal Skippy discovers he's adopted, Alex helps him cope with the shocking news.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: When Elyse has a convention speech in 'fascinating east coast resort' Atlantic City, she didn't plan to waste any time and money gambling.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: The news that their mother is pregnant sends the three Keaton kids into an angry outburst resulting in a family battle.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Mallory's enthusiasm for her part-time job at a boutique causes her grades to slip even lower than usual.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Steven and Elyse plan a nostalgic weekend with the kids before the baby arrives, and are crushed to discover that the children are not at all interested in reminiscing about old times-they'd rather be with their friends.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex is thrilled to be taking a college course taught by one of his personal heroes, Professor Ephraim Bronski. In his eagerness to impress the teacher he gets off to a bad start and is humiliated by his idol when he fails the first-class assignment.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex cannot accept the fact that he and everyone around him are growing up and desperately clings to his old ways.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex reluctantly accepts a part-time job with his father at the non-profit station, and his dad is bursting with pride to have him following in his footsteps.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex plays Cupid to help his shy pal Skippy get together with Jane, the girl of his dreams, but his good intentions go awry when the girl falls for him instead.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Little Jennifer is thrilled about getting a visit from her former neighborhood pal, Scott, whom she hasn't seen in five years.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: As an economics student, Alex finds it demeaning to be forced into a public service position, but his experiences at the crisis center give him a new outlook on life.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Steven gets depressed from interviewing frightfully inept candidates as housekeeper-nanny for the baby, such as a child-hater ad an ex-con.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: While Steven and Elyse are away on vacation, Mallory accidentally crashes her parents' car into a telephone pole. The kids need to raise money for auto repairs and decides to turn the Keaton house into a hotel.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex's chances for acceptance into a smug college fraternity are dependent upon him having a knockout date for the pledge dance.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Mallory is crushed when her favorite aunt dies suddenly, but her feelings of sadness turn to anger when family and friends at the funeral seem to be taking Aunt Trudy's death too lightly.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex befriends Donna, a young, unwed expectant mother from Elyse's natural-childbirth class.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex falls asleep while working on a college term paper on Thomas Jefferson and dreams that his family and friends are living 200 years ago.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: To help Steven during pledge week at the television station, the Keatons reluctantly agree to be part of the entertainment. The audience gets an unexpected show when Elyse goes into labor right on camera while in the middle of a song.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: A snowstorm prevents Elyse from getting to the hospital in time to deliver her baby.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The victim was well liked and successful, which made the brutality of the crime even harder to understand.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A brilliant young architect falls ill and dies just before she is to testify in a criminal trial. The autopsy reveals she'd been poisoned with arsenic. Investigators must determine who had a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A killer tries to incinerate everything that could link him to his crime. But in doing so, he inadvertently creates new forensic evidence. Detectives employ a technique never before used in a criminal investigation to bring it to light.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Trace
programme.desc: After being admitted to the hospital with unexplained bleeding, 11-month-old Chad Shelton dies. Investigators and scientists frantically search for a cause when others from the same house fall ill.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1995, the founder of American Atheists disappeared with one of her sons, her granddaughter and $500,000 in gold coins. The police investigated several suspects, including David R. Waters, who worked for American Atheists.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, Indiana police identified Richard Alexander as the “River Park Rapist” who assaulted four women that year. Later, DNA analysis casts doubt on his conviction.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within Arm's Reach
programme.desc: A police officer accused of killing his estranged wife insists she committed suicide. Investigators say it was murder — that it was physically impossible for the woman to have shot herself.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Young Navajos in the Southwest were dying at an alarming rate. The tribe's medicine men provided investigators with a critical clue that would lead halfway around the world to a most unlikely killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 29-year-old woman is killed instantly when a bomb explodes in her home. The device is so powerful that it embedded shrapnel in houses across the street. The bomber had not only knowledge and skill, but also a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1986, Gary Dale Larson was stabbed to death in his Edmond, Oklahoma home. The killer then sexually assaulted Larson's girlfriend, Janet Haynes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1998, a Maryland murder mystery performance turns into a real whodunit when the badly burned body of Stephen Hricko is discovered in his hotel room.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1988, the body of a young woman was discovered in an Ohio river. Most of the evidence had been washed away, but the victim's 6-year-old son unwittingly told investigators all they needed to know — without saying a word. The clue was in his genes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Susie Mowbray was charged in her husband's death. Her son was so convinced of her innocence that he enrolled in law school, studied all of the evidence and, eventually, discovered the truth of what really happened between his parents.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Soon after organizing a workers' strike, a union official is executed in his home. Neither his wife nor anyone in the neighborhood hear any gunshots. It takes a forensic sound test, an electron microscope and a nightgown to explain why.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Casino security cameras tracked a young woman's movements until shortly before she disappeared. She was never seen again, but through the evidence she left behind, she was able to tell investigators what happened to her and who was responsible.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When investigators found Bruce Miller dead in the office of his junkyard business, the crime scene was almost pristine. But when a computer forensics expert examined computers owned by the victim's wife and her lover, he found all the evidence needed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The body of a young girl was discovered on isolated farmland near Delano, California. She had no ID, but police found mailbox keys in the pocket of her jeans. With no other clues, they checked the mailboxes of every apartment building in Delano.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1989, the dead bodies of Joan Rogers and her two teenage daughters were found floating in Tampa Bay.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The victim had ingested a massive amount of cyanide. An unlikely clue — a flaw on a mailing envelope — exposed a murderer who was willing to kill innocent people.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On May 20, 2001, Carrie Nelson was beaten to death while working alone in a park office. The case went unsolved for six years. Finally, police found a match with DNA samples gathered from the crime scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Foul play is suspected when Fort Worth factory worker Glenda Furch disappears after completing her shift.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A neighbor watched as a man stabbed his wife, pushed her into the swimming pool and held her head under water. The husband, however, had no recollection of the crime. A jury would have to decide between evidence and the mysteries of the mind.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1993, the Amtrak Railroad experienced the deadliest train crash in United States history when the Sunset Limited derailed while crossing Alabama's Big Bayou Canot bridge. 47 passengers and crew were killed; scores more were injured.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When convenience store employee Wanda Mason is found dead, investigators find the entire murder has been caught on the store's security camera. But the image of the killer is so degraded it seems impossible to positively identify him.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A twelve-year-old girl claimed she had been abducted and sexually assaulted. She recounted what happened in such a flat, unemotional voice that police found it difficult to believe her. Fibers on her clothing would prove she was telling the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When an elderly couple died in a suspicious house fire, their son became the prime suspect. Investigators turned to forensic science to determine if the fire had been set deliberately, or if it was an unfortunate accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Each chef has 45 minutes to use a pressure cooker to make a meal using one of five cheap cuts of meat — each hidden in a pressure cooker — and fashion the dish as a five-star entrée.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay devises a team of former "Hell's Kitchen" winners to challenge the remaining contestants. The two teams must wow Chef Ramsay with their signature dishes.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The budding chefs create ten gourmet burgers, which are then evaluated by Chef Ramsay, Jean-Philippe and a row of judges associated with some of the finest restaurants in the country.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The remaining four contestants split into two teams. Each team has thirty minutes to replicate the sample dish using only taste, touch and sight.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The final two chefs must prepare two appetizers and three entrées to present to a panel of respected judges. The winner gets first pick in a team of chefs eliminated from the competition.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: In the season finale, the two chefs and their respective teams participate in a final dinner service that will determine this season's winner.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: In the season twelve premiere, Chef Ramsay splits the twenty competing chefs into two teams. For the first challenge, each team prepares a signature dish.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The teams compete in a tricycle relay race in which the chefs work in pairs to complete basic culinary tasks. The winners go on a dinner date with Chef Ramsay in San Francisco.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: After digging up 100 pounds of potatoes, the teams aim to delight Chef Ramsay with potato-based dishes.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen: 17 Chefs Compete
programme.desc: The remaining contestants pair up to make ravioli dishes. The winners spend a day at a Beverly Hills mansion while the losers prep kitchens and wrap pennies.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen: 16 Chefs Compete
programme.desc: The remaining contestants must match side dishes with four different types of protein. The winners spend a day at Laguna Beach while the losers prep honey taffy from scratch.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen: 15 Chefs Compete
programme.desc: Forgoing a challenge this episode, Chef Ramsay asks both teams to choose a captain for the dinner service, testing the aspiring chefs' communication, cooperation and leadership skills.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen: 14 Chefs Compete
programme.desc: The teams cook gourmet pizza that will be judged by Chef Ramsay and Wolfgang Puck. The winners spend the day at a rooftop swimming pool and enjoy a session with a yoga instructor.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The teams cook sampler dishes for guests at an event honoring the 160th anniversary of the Phi Mu sorority. Each team must serve a chicken, seafood and beef entrée.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: The girls shop in a toy store for a friend. Laverne sees a toy robot and plays with it. The robot blows a fuse though and attacks her. Leading the girls to sue the toy company - but the girls discover the law can be as unfeeling as that robot.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Dressed as Alice in Wonderland for a local children's play, Shirley ends up going to the hospital instead to get her appendix out. Her fear causes her to run and hide, so the gang must find her before her appendix fails her for good.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Two FBI agents use the girls' apartment to stake out criminal activity across the street. When the suspect gets outside their window the girls are shocked to see Carmine with him. Has Carmine gone bad or is there another explanation?

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Laverne and Shirley get reacquainted with Ms. Babish's mentally challenged daughter, Amy, who's visiting from her special school. Lenny meets Amy and immediately comes to like her, despite people's protests about what's best for Amy.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: It's New Years Eve 1959 and 1960 is shortly due. In the final hours, Laverne's date cancels, Shirley's sick, and Lenny and Squiggy have a special plan for midnight outside the apartment building. Will Laverne leave the '50s in tears or cheers?

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Shirley rescues a white horse. The owner wants to send it to the glue factory, but Shirley seeks him a happy home. She gets Edna in trouble with a health inspector for having him in the apartment. Will it be greener pastures for Buttercup?

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Laverne busts a tooth but won't see a dentist. Shirley suggests her student dentist cousin Mikey. Laverne's hates the idea. Mikey has flunked before. Shirley gets her okay but once in the chair will Laverne truly feel safe in Mikey's hands?

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Traveling to another city by bus for a blind date, the girls end up being ditched by two medical students who don't find them attractive - leaving the girls stranded overnight with no way home for over 12 hours.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: What begins as a humorous escapade with a motorcycle turns into a tragic vigil for the Cunninghams and their friends.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: When Ralph Malph is hypnotized to cure his fright after a tornado warning is posted, Ralph's loss of fear causes him to tempt fate by suggesting that the Fonz needs training wheels for his stupid motorcycle

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Joanie believes she has to smoke to fit in with the cool girls. She ignores the pleas from her family to stop, until the Fonz defines what cool really means

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: In a poignant, change-of-pace episode titled Fonzie's Blindness, Al barges through the kitchen door at the drive-in and hits Fonzie in the head with a tray of food.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: When Richie is caught two-timing Lori Beth for a pretty baton twirler, the Fonz has to step in and give Richie a few lessons in love.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Richie and the Fonz visit a massage parlor to escape the pressures of a heated class presidency race, and Richie's opposition photographs the sheet-clad candidate with a pretty masseuse.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Members of the Happy Days gang find themselves transformed into Pilgrims when Marion dreams of reviving the true spirit of Thanksgiving.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: The Fonz gets the shock of his life on Christmas, when a merchant seaman from the Orient delivers a gift to him from his long-lost father.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Terror-stricken Mork believes the examiner assigned to give him a driving test is an incarnation of the devil, and careens along the test course in a spectacular tilted wheelie, with Mindy and Mearth in the car.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: All of Mork's Earth memory is zapped into thin air by vengeful Orson on Ork when Mork neglects his job of reporting back to his planet because of family responsibilities.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: All that glitters is Mork's gold when the Orkan learns how to make the precious metal from polyester, buys Mindy a 60-room mansion where she can stable her new horse and hires tennis star Tracy Austin as son Mearth's tennis coach.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mork is overjoyed that he and Mindy can finally let it all hang out when he meets Kalnik - an alien from Neptune who apparently is also married to an earthling and the four seem to have everything in common.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mindy lets Mork move into her apartment, much to the dispute of her father.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: When a reporter offers a reward for proof of alien life, Mork decides to turn himself in to pay back the McConnells.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Laverne, Shirley, Frank, and Edna travel to New York to visit Frank's mother and attend a street festival; they are joined there by Lenny and Squiggy (who hitchhiked).

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Lou recalls all of her past relationship troubles, after what happened at her high school reunion. Ty and Amy are rattled when they find their home broken into.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Georgie convinces Amy to work with a high-strung and dangerous jumping horse. Back for Thanksgiving, Jade finds out why Tim wanted her to take the rodeo scholarship.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: A training accident results in an injury, and an unlikely ally arrives to show support.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy and Ty decide what to do with the land Jack gifted to them. Lou is unsure how to support Georgie, who is considering giving up showjumping because of viral video.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Right before the Fall Finale, Georgie is given a new offer by Val. Ty enlists Caleb's help in fulfilling a promise he made. Amy works on something special with Spartan before Lyndy's naming ceremony.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy and Ty care for a wild mare and her foal. Which provides a solution to their parenting problems.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy and Ty plan a romantic trip to Pike River, but Jack tags along to visit an old friend.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Ty is asked to mentor a troubled kid, but finding common ground proves harder than he expected.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy and Ty treat an injured animal while on Lyndy's first camping trip. Jade has a bad fall off a bronc, and Tim and Georgie try to convince her to see a doctor.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Georgie and Wyatt work to reunite a famous trick-rider with her long-lost horse. Amy and Ty try to find a way to connect with Luke. Jack finally loses his patience with his unwanted house guest, Tim.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: When the new manager at Fairfield comes to them with an unusual concern, Amy and Ty find themselves at odds about how best to treat her horse.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy and Tim organize a family penning event, while Georgie helps Jade work through her newfound fear of riding.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Lou returns with an unconventional idea to attract guests to the dude ranch. Georgie's dedication to training takes a massive toll on her relationship.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy and Ty work together to treat a doped racehorse, but when it turns into a race against the clock Amy looks to an unexpected source for help.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En la primera parte del estreno de la temporada, dieciséis concursantes tienen la oportunidad de alcanzar el estrellato culinario y un puesto de Chef ejecutivo en la ciudad turística canadiense de Whistler, Columbia Británica.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En la parte final del estreno de temporada, vuelve un competidor de la quinta temporada y los quince cocineros restantes se preparan para una cena marinera.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay despierta a los Chefs restantes en medio de la noche y les ordena que preparen una cena de espaguetis para los bomberos hambrientos. Los perdedores deben lavar y encerar los camiones de bomberos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los competidores deben crear perros calientes de proporciones perfectas para las celebridades Drew Lachey, John O'Hurley, Tom Green, Melinda Clarke, Christopher 'Kid' Reid y Kristy Swanson.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los doce Chefs restantes deberán planificar un saludo gastronómico por el regreso de un marine americano. El equipo perdedor tendrá que limpiar y decorar la fiesta de Tana Ramsay.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los Chefs restantes deben crear comidas de tres platos que sumen solo 700 calorías. Los ganadores fueron a la playa con la jugadora de voleibol de playa Annett Davis.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los Chefs restantes tiran los dados para determinar qué ingredientes usar para su plato de desafío. El equipo ganador gana un viaje a Las Vegas.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los nueve Chefs restantes realizan una prueba de sabor a ciegas. Los ganadores cenan con el Chef Ramsay en un comedor completamente oscuro donde no pueden ver lo que están comiendo.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los Chefs restantes hacen crepes. Los ganadores cenarán en un restaurante francés mientras los perdedores se preparan para un servicio de cena con temática francesa.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los medallistas olímpicos de invierno Sasha Cohen y Jonny Moseley aparecen como jueces invitados. Para este desafío, todos los ingredientes deben provenir de Whistler, B.C.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los seis participantes restantes deben replicar los platos que les preparó el Chef Ramsay. Los ganadores cenarán con la ganadora de la cuarta temporada, Christina Machamer.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El desafío para cada uno de los concursantes restantes es hacer un plato que se vea y sepa igual. Los expertos de la revista 'Bon Appetit' ayudan al Chef Ramsay a juzgar.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los participantes conocen una versión en miniatura del Chef Ramsay: el actor y chico impresionista británico Felix Light. Deben preparar comidas sin carne para él y otros ochenta jóvenes.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En la primera parte del final de temporada, los tres concursantes restantes deberán preparar un plato con ingredientes de todo el mundo. Los jueces son un grupo de expertos culinarios internacionales.

programme.title: Christmas on Chestnut Street
programme.desc: A materialistic storekeeper (Kristen Dalton) learns the true meaning of Christmas after her employee (Robert Moloney) starts a holiday competition.

programme.title: The Ugly Christmas Sweater
programme.desc: A woman hopes to impress her new boss and the cute guy in her cubicle, but she is forced to wear an ugly Christmas sweater that she got from her eccentric grandmother.

programme.title: Christmas on Ice
programme.desc: A former figure skater and a former hockey player work together to stop the mayor from closing the local skating rink.

programme.title: Delivering Christmas
programme.desc: After a young girl tells her mailman that her mother is sad, he decides to bring surprise gifts to the mother to remind her of the Twelve Days of Christmas.

programme.title: The Holiday Fix Up
programme.desc: When Sam, an interior designer, returns home during the holidays to help renovate the Bell Harbor Inn, she gets paired with Coop as her contractor. The only problem - he's the guy who broke her heart, and she's the one who got away.

programme.desc: A new pastor finds romance during Christmastime while trying to get the church choir ready for the town's annual Winter Jamboree.

programme.title: The Christmas Snowman
programme.desc: A woman wakes to discover her handsome new neighbor is none other than the living embodiment of the snowman she built the day before.

programme.desc: Caught in a blizzard on Christmas Eve, a woman and her estranged daughter find refuge inside a church with a group of parishioners. The spirit of the holiday season soon takes hold as they reconcile their differences through music, faith and love.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los del Barrio llegan a su edificio y se dan cuenta que está rodeado por un gran muro que les impide la entrada.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia del Barrio se va de vacaciones a Acapulco, invitados por Gaspar. Después de una gran borrachera en el Baby'O, el abuelo amanece en la casa de Acapulco Shore.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Accidentalmente, el Abuelo descubre las habilidades boxísticas de Peluzín y se dedica a explotarlas. Mientras, el Noruego se embarca en la búsqueda de un nuevo hobbie.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Camino a rentar una película, el Noruego adquiere una nueva mascota. En tanto, Peluzín tiene que mudarse de su departamento por falta de pago.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se topa con un niño de la calle con quien supuestamente mantiene un parentesco mientras que Peluzín organiza un negocio piramidal para aprovecharse de todos los del edificio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un incidente hace que Irma revalore su vida y desaparezca. Mientras el Abuelo y el Noruego tratan de encontrarla, Gaspar y Jonathan tratan de encontrarle su lugar a Olaf en la familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Independientemente de resultado de las elecciones norteamericanas, Donald Trump decide declarale la guerra a México y LFDB se embarca en una misión especial para derrocar al tirano Trump.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú recibe una visita de su pasado el cual lleva muchos años tratando de dejar atrás, mientras que el Noruego se embarca en una búsqueda para conseguirle una madre a Olaf.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una parodia de La Rosa de Guadalupe, el Abuelo es encarado por su familia para tratarse su adicción al sexo, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de Olaf para establecer un negocio ilícito en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una hilarante parodia de A Christmas Carol, en la que al Abuelo se le aparecen fantasmas del pasado presente y futuro. Olaf es Timmy y Peluzin el fantasma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar cansado de la ineficiencia y corrupción decide postularse como servidor público, mientras que Irma es grabada en una situación incómoda, convirtiéndose en una celebridad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelúzín se roba un paquete de la puerta de Don Sebas, volteando a todo el edificio de cabeza, mientras Jonathan, cansado del bullying del Abuelo decide darle una lección.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: LFDB decide hacerle una intervención al Abuelo porque está mas hostil que nunca y quieren que busque tratamiento médico, mientras que Peluzín y Jonathan ayudan a Pitipú a conseguir su nacionalidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Despúes de una ardua búsqueda el Noruego encuentra a su padre, mientras que Jonathan ayuda a Peluzín a llevar una vida de bien.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide recuperar a su antigua mascota tlacuache llamada Chofri, mientras que el Abuelo atraviesa por un lapso de demencia senil y depende de Gaspar salvarlo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño bebé aparece en la puerta de LFDB, quien viene acarreando una ola de destrucción. Ahora la salvación del mundo depende de la Familia del Barrio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo consigue una ocupación donde se siente como pez en el agua, mientras que Peluzín entra en un proyecto experimental que le traerá muchos problemas a todos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar encuentra por fin el amor de manera inesperada mientras que el Pasita, triste por las limitaciones de su edad avanzada consigue la receta para la eterna juventud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Frustrado por su trabajo, Gaspar busca apoyo en el Abuelo y el Noruego y termina accidentado. Mientras, gracias a la medicina experimental, Peluzín se convierte en el Dr Lambretón.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelu el Payaso le pide a Jony que sea su nuevo ayudante e inician una gira espectacular que da muchos frutos. Mientras tanto, el Noruego descubre su afición por los tatuajes.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín adquiere una nueva mascota que revolucionará el vecindario. En tanto el Noruego y Gaspar intentan ayudar a el Lentejas a superar sus extrañas inclinaciones sexuales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y el Noruego buscan nuevos horizontes a través de la creación de una fundación, mientras Peluzín cae en la cuenta de su soledad y sale a buscar amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego aprende inglés y se prepara para vivir el sueño americano. En tanto, el Abuelo llega a un reencuentro con sus ex-compañeros de colegio y descubre una verdad sepultada por el tiempo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín tiene éxito con un nuevo método de protesta, mientras El Noruego y Jony dan sus primeros pasos en la "cossa nostra

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia abre un grupo de WhatsApp para estar más conectados pero este se sale de control, mientras que Peluzín aprrovecha una noticia de un asesinato para sacarle dinero a Pitipú.

programme.title: What is Classic Rock?
programme.desc: How do you define classic rock? Is it a genre, a radio format, or music from a specific period of time? Filmmaker & lifelong rocker Daniel Sarkissian travels the world, interviewing iconic artists in search of an answer.

programme.title: Tom Petty: Fallin' Free
programme.desc: Tom Petty was one of the most successful rockers of his generation; his unique blend of country, blues, rock, and psychedelia earned him and his bands a cult following from around the world, but his life wasn’t without suffering.

programme.title: Willie Nelson: Highs and Lows
programme.desc: An emerging counter-culture connects with Willie's unorthodox ways; the Outlaw Movement.

programme.title: Santana: Live At US Festival
programme.desc: From award-winning filmmaker and rockumentarian Glenn Aveni, Santana: Live At US Festival offers a tremendous performance from the legendary Carlos Santana, rivaling his set at Woodstock for its energy, excitement, and inspiring musicianship

programme.title: Metallica: Masters of Metal
programme.desc: They are one of the most influential heavy metal bands of all time. Alongside Slayer, Anthrax, and Megadeth, the Masters of Metal are an important part of the "big four".

programme.title: Parrot Heads
programme.desc: An in-depth look at the world of \"Parrot Heads\", the loyal fan base of Jimmy Buffett.

programme.title: Led Zeppelin: Whole Lotta Rock
programme.desc: Led Zeppelin, One of the most iconic rock bands of all time, and key pioneers of heavy metal. Follow the band through their journey, from formation in 1968, their exciting climb to being one of the most influential bands in history.

programme.title: Brainiac: Transmissions After Zero
programme.desc: Night Flight Presents: An exploration of the seminal 90's rock band Brainiac; its creative force Tim Taylor and the tragedy they overcame.

programme.title: Brian Eno 1971-1977: The Man Who Fell To Earth

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: The widow Elena is the only one who knows where her late husband hid his fortune. Zenigata shows up to protect her from Lupin's gang, who are out to steal it from her. Zenigata and Elena go to her mountain retreat to hide from Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Nyx, Agent MI6 of the British Secret Service, values his wife and daughters above all others, so he keeps his identity as MI6 a secret from them. However, one of his daughters is kidnapped by some mysterious men.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: An eerie old castle converted to a hotel, known as the "The Mansion of the Cursed Bride," where the ghost of a bride is said to appear. It's said that a priceless treasure rests in the hotel, so Lupin and the gang pay a visit.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Long ago a dictator was assassinated, and the assassins involved were later killed one by one. Goemon was one of those involved in the assassination. A former bodyguard of the assassinated dictator, the legendary sniper Zora, might be out for revenge...

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin is invited by both Fujiko and Rebecca to a couples-only wine auction party. Both women have their sights on the same thing: The Lovesick Pig, a legendary wine appearing in the auction.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Rebecca is kidnapped and Lupin must rescue her! Before she was kidnapped, Rebecca had been deciphering a book left behind by a genius scientist, and MI6 made the mysterious comment that it was the "Dream of Italy.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin finally deciphers the book left behind by the genius scientist Uraga, and then mysteriously falls asleep. He ends up in a world where it's impossible to tell whether what he sees is a dream or reality. Is this the "Dream of Italy"?!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin has been arrested and imprisoned. He's tried everything he could to escape, but Zenigata stops him every time. Zenigata then sends Lupin to an even higher-security prison, just to be on the safe side. Has the end of Lupin III has come at last?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin is so broke that he doesn't know what he'll eat tomorrow, so he concocts a plan to steal the Mona Lisa. But the Mona Lisa won't be easy to steal. He does his best to weave through the security net Zenigata has set.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Like a she-devil, the diamond "Cleopatra's Soul" is constantly changing owners. In search of the diamond, Lupin arrives at what appears to be an ordinary school...

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin, Jigen, and Goemon decide to go eat some tasty sushi, but when they hop in the car to leave, they find a dog inside. Lupin promises to drop the dog off with Fujiko while they're out getting sushi.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Greco is a man revered as a savior for defeating evildoers one after another. Everyone Greco targets die within 24 hours, killing and being killed by their own comrades. When provoked by Greco, Lupin and the gang head to Greco's church.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: A mysterious portrait of Lupin appears at a major fashion show in Milan. When it's determined that the portraits have been painted by Leonardo Da Vinci, Lupin realizes something and rushes to the church where "The Last Supper" is displayed.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: While shopping with his family, Nyx is shot by someone and loses consciousness. He wakes up bound, and before he is Percival, his boss from his days as MI6.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin has stolen the car that the famous singer Nora Anita loved and drove for nearly half a century. Zenigata and the police are after him, but they won't make a move for fear of damaging the priceless car. Where is Lupin headed in the treasured car?!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: While in Italy, Lupin gets a call from someone claiming to have kidnapped Fujiko. The kidnapper blackmails Lupin into stealing a marionette once owned by Gennai Hiraga and now being kept in a mansion in Tokyo.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Declarations of theft show up throughout the city, and they all bear the message "Tonight I'm going to get you, Lupin III," with a lipstick mark underneath. The one who's been distributing the notes is Rebecca.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Da Vinci announces that he is going to unveil his latest work in San Marino. Its title is "World Harmony." After the announcement, for some reason, people all around the Italian Peninsula fall unconscious... and Lupin and the gang are no exception.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Rebecca's personality is under Da Vinci's control. In an effort to save her, Lupin delves into her mind, where he struggles with all kinds of traps set by Da Vinci. He manages to find Rebecca's memories, but Da Vinci has overwritten all her memories.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin meets Rebecca to sign divorce papers, before they could finish they are attacked by zombies.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Rebecca remembers the first time she meets Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Lupin's new target is the digital currency gained from the transactions made on this site. Lupin sneaks into a massive high-security server facility, known as the "twin towers". Lupin greets the guard to the key, a young girl and skilled hacker "Ami".

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Hunt down the greatest thief of our times, Lupin III!" The Marco Polo executives have set a trap in the form of the Lupin Game. This has people all over the world tracking down Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Shinpei Mayama, the Rat Clan, Union Mama... the all-stars of assassination, from all over the world, suddenly come after Lupin. They're players in a new game started by the executives of Marco Polo: Happy Deathday.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Fujiko smiles deviously as she points her gun at Lupin, when Zenigata arrives to save him and Ami. They get into the inspector's car which takes off, but it's soon attacked by soldiers who are trying to cash in the price on Lupin's head.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Lupin is shot in the head by a drone fighter. With the death of its target, the Lupin Game is concluded. Time passes, and people forget about the game. Released from his duty of hunting Lupin, Ami now lives with Zenigata, when one day Goemon visits her.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: The "Smart Safe" has come to the Greater Tokyo Bank. Lupin is goaded by Fujiko and Jigen to try and crack the technological wonder. What can he do against this peculiarly secure safe?

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: The Red Sox were down three runs and down to their final out against Aroldis Chapman in the 9th inning. After a pair of clutch at-bats helped tie the game, Andrew Benintendi hit a slow chopper in the 10th to walk it off against the Yankees at Fenway Park.

programme.title: Great Games

programme.title: Great Games

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 7/19/19: Down by seven runs entering the 6th inning, the Cardinals erupted with 10 runs, capped by José Martínez's three-run homer, leading St. Louis to a thrilling 12-11 comeback win against the Reds.

programme.title: El precio de la historia

programme.title: Efecto mariposa

programme.title: Archivos de ovni

programme.title: Estado paranormal
programme.desc: Estado paranormal investiga a una adolescente que es perseguida por nieblas negras y muestra signos de posible influencia demoníaca. Ryan se pregunta si es fruto de una posesión o solo de una depresión.

programme.title: Estado paranormal

programme.title: Más allá de la realidad: realidad o ficción

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Se ha dicho que cada fotografía roba una parte del alma de un hombre. Entonces, ¿qué ocurre con todas esas partes cuando la persona ya ha fallecido?

programme.title: Cazadores de ovnis
programme.desc: Hay aproximadamente 30 000 vuelos comerciales en los Estados Unidos todos los días, y a medida que aumenta el número de vuelos, también lo hace la posibilidad de los encuentros con ovnis.

programme.title: Cazadores de ovnis
programme.desc: Invasión a Texas, 2008. El equipo está siguiendo la pista de un caso que acaba de ocurrir, uno que tuvo a todo el país hablando hace apenas unas semanas. En diciembre de 2007, la gente comienza a ver ovnis en los cielos a 150 km de Dallas, Texas.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba

programme.title: Africa, la más salvaje.

programme.title: Iconos de vida silvestre

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: Los valles fértiles y los sitios arqueológicos del Líbano dan testimonio de la importancia histórica del país. A pesar de la devastación en numerosos conflictos, Líbano, país de cedro, siempre se ha levantado de nuevo con orgullo.

programme.title: Sobrevivir en la naturaleza
programme.desc: La buena comunicación es una de las estrategias más versátiles e importantes para la supervivencia tanto en animales solitarios como en animales sociales.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Melody believes her boyfriend Glenn hired Marra to wash cars in a bikini and sleep with him. Glenn suspects Melody hasn't been faithful too. Plus, Dani isn't sure if her boyfriend Robert slept with her sister.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Desmond believes that his ex, Cassandra, is making up a story about him touching their child because she's jealous of his new fiancee. And later, Tammy has been investigated for child abuse and even accused of locking her kids in a closet.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Alyssa refuses to marry Christian until he can prove his fidelity, but Christian says she is the cheater. Then, Larry wants to prove to Andrea that he is not a cheater, but admits to putting himself in compromising positions. Who's telling the truth?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Steve’s hosting another teen girl town hall to address critical issues all teen girls could face, including drug use, physical abuse, and online predators. No question is off-limits!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Solo has a few things he needs to tell his best friend and girlfriend, Vixen. Next Cheryl caught her boyfriend, Nick, in bed with another woman. Later Lonnie's wife, Kim, is having an affair with their 18-year-old friend.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Jennifer caught her boyfriend and friend of 7 years in their hotel room and now she wants answers! Then, After 6 years, Ralph is finally ready to call it quits with his girlfriend. But she will give him a run for his money before she lets him go!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Jennifer refuses to let her ex-boyfriend, Marcus, go. She says she'll get him back no matter what it takes. Next Eddie left Glinda and their two-year-old son 16 years ago. Today Glinda tells Eddie that she wants him back.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Lisa's husband, Mickey, moved his mistress into their house 3 months ago! Then LaTasha's boyfriend, Maurice, has been cheating with Day Day! Maurice says it's over with Day Day, but much to his surprise, LaTasha won't take him back!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Our guests today say their sinful sex secrets may cause broken hearts and family feuds.

programme.title: The Maury Show: Is My Man Sleeping With My Teen Nephew?
programme.desc: Nikki won’t marry Will until he proves he’s faithful, but what did our hidden cameras confirm? Then, teens Jessica and Sean are days away from marriage. Could Sean be cheating with her best friend?

programme.title: The Maury Show: 5 Men Tested … Are Any of Them My Baby's Dad?
programme.desc: Teshinya suspects that Clarence is picking up women at church and went undercover to get proof! Desirae is 17 and 5 months pregnant, but thinks her boyfriend Chris is cheating with her friend!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: 35-year old Lil Tia thinks her 24-year old boyfriend Antonio is cheating with her teen niece and daughter! Plus, Kim suspects her boyfriend Marcell of cheating and Laura thinks her boyfriend Tim is his cab for more than rides.

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Centavia suspects that her man Richard is cheating on her with Kheisha, the babysitter. Then, Kristy is going to reveal 2 secrets to her boyfriend Matt that might end their relationship. Find out these shocking secrets today!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Tonya wants to tell her man that she's pregnant and cheating with her transsexual roommate, Gina! Mike has been sleeping with his fiancé’s cousin for a year! Then, Jimmy has a pregnant fiancé AND girlfriend!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Jake slept with his brother Joe’s fiancé. Then, Danny claims he’s leaving his fiancé Heather for a professional escort named Chelsi. Plus more stories of wild nuptials.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Bizarre sexual fetishes come out! Brad’s girlfriend wants him to dress like a little girl. Melissa wants her boyfriend Steve to stop his sexual fetish of flashing.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Nikki revela sus aventuras fraternales secretas, pero ¿podrá Joe perdonarla? Después, "Six O'Clock" confiesa que ha estado acostándose con el novio de su amiga Carisa por dinero.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Johnny quiere que su novia Aimee lo acepte como es. Después, Maya viene al programa para confrontar a su novio Eric sobre sus costumbres.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: En este episodio especial, un grupo de espectadores selectos se enfrentará a algunos de los más memorables invitados de Jerry.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Khloe está dispuesta a contarle a Jamal que quizá no sea la mujer que él cree que es. Nick ha venido a confrontar a su esposa Barbara y al hombre con el que se ha estado acostando, Jason.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Carlton ha venido a revelarle a su novia que lleva una doble vida gay. Además, Tom Bergeron de "Bailando con las Estrellas" de la TV hará de juez famoso en un concurso de baile. Luego, Crystal le revela a su marido, Bobby, su infidelidad.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Jake se acostó con el prometido de su hermano Joe. Después, Danny dice que dejará a su prometida Heather por una dama de compañía profesional llamada Chelsi. Además, hay más historias de matrimonios disparatados.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: John está siendo infiel a su esposa Destinee con Cici, pero Cici también tiene algunos secretos. Entonces, Lala suelta un bombazo a su novio. Además, Michael y su esposa Tayliana tienen secretos que revelarse mutuamente.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Jaycee le demuestra a Brandy que nunca es correcto ser infiel y arruinar a una familia. Casi cree que su prometido podría aprender una lección de Kevin, un antiguo invitado. Además, concertamos una cita entre la espectadora Tamara y el invitado Nathan.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: ¡Anitra se entera de quién es realmente su pareja Kevin! Después, James está a semanas de casarse con Liz, pero tiene dos importantes secretos que contar. Después, Elliot dice que cometió el peor error de su vida al ser infiel a su novio, Rob.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: James está comprometido con Amanda, pero ahora confiesa lo de Melanie. Después, Jewel compite por el amor de su amante cuando Christa anuncia que lo quiere para ella.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Misty odia tanto al marido que se acaba de casar con su mejor amiga que está dispuesta a pagar el divorcio. ¡Lucus está dispuesto a divorciarse de su esposa de 6 semanas si su familia no deja de entrometerse!

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Hope ha venido a enfrentarse a su mejor amiga, Laura, por robarle a su novio, Joey, y luego comprometerse con él. A continuación, John dirá que no tiene la culpa por acostarse con la mejor amiga de su novia.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Kenny vivía con dos hermanas, Lora y Misty, que también son sus amantes, pero las trata como sirvientas. Después, Jerry confronta a Kenny con los resultados de 9 pruebas de paternidad positivas, pero Kenny dice que solamente le importan 2 de sus 9 hijos.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Anita está dispuesta a dejar a su marido por su ex-amante. Luego Theresa está siendo infiel a su prometido con su hermano. Más tarde Kevin viene a decirle al ex de su novia, Jermaine, que se aleje.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario y Caridad tienen la esperanza que Angeliquita haga un poco feliz a Rosaura, que aún no ha podido recuperar a su hijita, pero Silvano llega para desafiar a Luis Mario.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Panchita riñe a Verdoso por haberle gritado a Eduardo que asesinó a Anselmo y trata de hacerlo callar pero el loro la acusa de haber sido ella quien se lo contó. Caridad se entera de todo.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Mairita corre a buscar a su hermana para contarle que Teobaldito está muy asustado porque su madre está en la casa y él teme que se lo quiera llevar.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Camelia se cuela en la habitación de Rosaura y toma a Angeliquita en los brazos. Ella comienza a burlarse de la bebé porque su madre nunca sabrá quien es ella. La niña termina llorando y Camelia se marcha.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Fidela siente compasión por Rosaura al ver que tanto sufre por su hija perdida, pero el temor que siente por Sonia la obliga a callar la verdad.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Eva va a la hacienda Arismendi para descubrir ante Luis Mario que Marybella puede ver. Ella le pone una pistola en la cien a la modelo, pero ella no dice nada.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Patricio le jura a Camelia que aun cuando se compruebe que él y Luis Mario son hermanos, jamás permitiría que se quede con Rosaura y tampoco se destruirá el odio que siente por él.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Silvano se queda sin palabras, esperando que el detective le diga quién es la madre que busca desde hace tanto tiempo. Jimena termina por convencer a Iván que debe casarse con Adriana.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Caridad descubre que Maribella si puede ver y la conmina a que le diga la verdad a Luis Mario. Caridad le da una semana de plazo a Maribella para hablar. Guillermo trata de convencer a Minerva.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Eduarda se lleva a Caridad a la cocina y pretende asustarla para que guarde silencio sobre lo que descubrió de Maribella, pero se le enfrenta y termina amenazándola.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura se siente más tranquila cuando está listo el retrato hablado de su partera. El comisario está seguro que esto es un gran paso en la investigación que adelantan.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario y Silvano llegan a la boda de Iván y de Adriana y se comportan como gallitos de pelea. Guillermo trata de tranquilizar a Jimena, quien está muy triste por el próximo matrimonio.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario visita a Rosaura en su casa para pedirle perdón pero ella se asusta y Claudia llega para lograr que el hombre se marche. Fidela le ruega a Sonia que le digan la verdad a Rosaura.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario está desesperado porque en la comisaría no le dan información sobre su hija y tiene que hablar con Rosaura y no tiene noticias nuevas que darle. Claudia y Rosaura siguen esperando.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Laki’s pursuit of precious Vearth causes one of her Shandorian comrades to be injured during the battle with Ohm. As night falls on Upper Yard, the Straw Hats dream of gold while dancing with wolves!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The electrifying deity of Skypiea, God Eneru, grants his priests unlimited power in their hunt for the Straw Hats. Usopp has a plan to get the mysteriously-repaired Going Merry back in the water, but it involves using Chopper as bait!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats scatter when their search for gold uncovers a giant python, and Gan Fall reveals the tragic story of Jaya’s arrival in the sky. Meanwhile, Wyper readies the Shandorians for a raid on Eneru’s shrine!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the heartless god of Upper Yard eagerly anticipates the dawning of Sky Warefare, the Shandorian forces are savagely snared by the Ordeal of String, and Luffy wanders into the fight of his life!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro rushes to perfect a deadly technique known as the Flying Blade Attack. The move proves difficult to master, but it could be the key to the swordsman surviving a battle with the Shandorian warrior, Braham.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji and Usopp are driven to their knees by the electrifying presence of god, Luffy is nearly incinerated by Wyper’s Burn Bazooka, and Nami joins Gan Fall in a fight against two killer clones!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Chopper unleashes the fury of his Rumble Ball during a sticky slugfest with a swap cloud spewing priest of Upper Yard. Can the little reindeer discover his opponent’s lone weakness before it’s too late?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami and the Knight of the Sky team up to obliterate two bumbling, balloon-shaped bad guys, and God Eneru relies on his astounding invincibility to torment a noble Shandorian warrior.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Robin’s search for a mystical city of gold is interrupted by Yama, one of Eneru’s faithful servants. When the rampaging warrior destroys some ancient ruins, he provokes the wrath of Robin’s many fists of fury!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Priest Ohm silences Chopper with an attack from which few – if any – ever recover. Meanwhile, Luffy begins to notice something strange about his cave-like prison, and four fearsome warriors prepare for battle!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro, Gan Fall, Wyper, Ohm, and a prizefighting pooch gather for a ferocious free-for-all at the site of the Upper Ruins. While the battle rages, Luffy tries to punch his way out of the belly of a poisonous python!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro and Wyper are out to beat down the same bad guys, but will they realize it soon enough to survive a white-barbed death match of doom? Deep in the belly of the python, Nami and Luffy enjoy what could be a short-lived reunion!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Eager to end their battle, Zoro aims the awesome destructive power of his 108 Caliber Phoenix at the sinister Priest Ohm! Elsewhere, god demands that Robin help him search for a legendary golden bell.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: God Eneru begins a deadly rampage aimed at exterminating the heavenly beings of Skypiea, and the ruins of Shandora become the scene of a bloody contest where survival is the name of the game.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Gan Fall, Wyper, Zoro, and Robin join forces for an attack on God Eneru. Despite their furious onslaught, the four warriors prove powerless to harm the thunderous deity until Wyper utilizes the power of a mystical stone!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: God Eneru makes a shocking recovery from wounds that should have ended his reign of terror. Zoro and Wyper muster the strength for one final stand, and Nami must choose between her friends – and survival.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy emerges from his serpentine tomb with one thing on his mind: revenge! As the rubber-man sets out to settle the score with God Eneru, Conis rushes to warn her people of their impending doom!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the citizens of the sky run for their lives, Eneru issues in the dawn of Deathpiea! Luffy is determined to stop the madman, but first he must discover a way to lay hands on the heinous holy man!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A handful of gold sends Luffy hurtling towards his death, Sanji and Usopp mount a midair rescue mission, and Nami prepares for an electrifying showdown with God Eneru!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp arrives just in time to save Nami from a lethal thunderbolt, but even their combined powers are no match for Eneru. While they scramble for an escape route, Sanji stealthily searches for a way to sabotage god’s ark!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Despite being slowed by an arm encased in gold, Luffy races up a giant beanstalk on a mission to settle the score with Eneru! Elsewhere, the people of Skypiea feel the jolt of god’s wrath!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A flashback offers a glimpse at the lives of two legendary figures in Skypiea’s history: Montblanc Noland and the ferocious warrior Kalgara!

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: Die Another Day
programme.desc: James Bond's newest mission begins with a spectacular high-speed hovercraft chase through a minefield in the demilitarized zone separating North and South Korea - and the action doesn't let up until the credits roll.

programme.title: Quantum of Solace
programme.desc: On a non-stop quest for justice that crisscrosses the globe, Bond (Daniel Craig) uncovers an intricate conspiracy by the mysterious Quantum organization to take control of one of the world's most important natural resources! Judi Dench also stars.

programme.title: Skyfall
programme.desc: Daniel Craig is back as James Bond and his loyalty to MI6 leader M (Judi Dench) is tested as her past returns to haunt her. 007 must track down and destroy the threat, no matter how personal the cost. Javier Bardem and Ralph Fiennes also star.

programme.title: Quantum of Solace
programme.desc: On a non-stop quest for justice that crisscrosses the globe, Bond (Daniel Craig) uncovers an intricate conspiracy by the mysterious Quantum organization to take control of one of the world's most important natural resources! Judi Dench also stars.

programme.title: Goldeneye
programme.desc: Pierce Brosnan ignites the screen as James Bond in this explosive, thrill-packed adventure that pits him against a vengeful adversary who controls an awesome space weapon capable of global destruction.

programme.title: La espía que me amó
programme.desc: Nadie lo hace mejor que Bond, y lo comprueba una vez más en esta explosiva y entretenida aventura que lo lleva de las pirámides egipcias hasta el fondo del océano y a una desafiante persecución de esquí en la cima de una montaña.

programme.title: Misión espacial
programme.desc: El agente 007 se lanza a una trepidante aventura que lo lleva desde Venecia hasta Río de Janeiro y más allá, al espacio exterior. Roger Moore encarna por cuarta vez al carismático agente 007.

programme.title: Sólo para sus ojos
programme.desc: James Bond se ve inmerso en una de sus más intensas aventuras en este paquete de acción, de increíbles acrobacias, encuentros apasionados y excitantes enfrentamientos.

programme.title: Octopussy
programme.desc: Desde una emocionante persecución en jet hasta una cuenta regresiva de un desastre nuclear, James Bond vuelve en una electrizante aventura que nos lleva al límite del estremecimiento con emoción incesante.

programme.title: En la mira de los asesinos
programme.desc: Roger Moore llena la pantalla de humor, elegancia y encanto. Bond se enfrenta a Max Zorin (Christopher Walken), quien busca controlar el mercado de microchips, incluso si significa matar a millones para lograrlo.

programme.title: Su nombre es peligro
programme.desc: Equipado con agudos instintos y una licencia para matar, James Bond enfrenta a mercaderes de armas diabólicos decididos a dominar el mundo en esta emocionante y tumultuosa aventura.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible III
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt hurdles into spectacular new adventures from Rome to Shanghai as he races to rescue a captured agent and stop Davian from eliminating his next target, Ethan’s wife.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Ghost Protocol
programme.desc: Agent Ethan Hunt and his elite team go underground after a bombing implicates them as terrorists. While trying to clear their name, the team uncovers a plot to start a nuclear war.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt, a secret agent, is framed for the deaths of his espionage team and attempts to flee government assassins after him. He races against the clock in order to discover the truth.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible II
programme.desc: The world's greatest spy, Ethan Hunt, returns and partners up with the beautiful Nyah Hall to stop renegade agent Sean Ambrose from releasing a new kind of terror on an unsuspecting world.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible III
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt hurdles into spectacular new adventures from Rome to Shanghai as he races to rescue a captured agent and stop Davian from eliminating his next target, Ethan’s wife.

programme.title: Wild Animal Orphans
programme.desc: It's a year later, and things have changed! Marlice and Rudie have a new baby boy, and he needs to be introduced to the animals.

programme.title: Chasing Monsters
programme.desc: Stuck between a herd of elephants charging straight for him and the shark-infested waters on the other side, Cyril has nowhere to hide. He is in the dangerous jungle of Gabon, West Africa, on a mission to catch a fanged predatory fish with a deadly bite.

programme.title: Wild Asia

programme.title: Shark Dive TV
programme.desc: Shark Dive TV explores the odd behavior of Hammerhead Sharks, goes on a Blue Hole adventure in Belize featuring a friendly shark, and takes a Deeper Dive to study Scalloped Hammerhead Sharks and Nurse Sharks.

programme.title: Whale Sharks…Gentle Giants
programme.desc: Whale Sharks, gentle giants of the sea, are nearly 50 feet in length and weigh over 30 tons! With recent technology, researchers can identify, catalogue and track individual sharks. Whale shark tourism has proven to be both a blessing and a curse.

programme.title: Wild Menu
programme.desc: Out in the wild there are lots of different utensils.

programme.title: Chasing Monsters
programme.desc: Growing to over 1400 lbs, the blue fin tuna is a true titan prowling the oceans, and it's extremely powerful and fast. To help protect these endangered giants, Cyril is recruited by a team of biologists to travel up the East Coast of the USA and Canada.

programme.title: Zoo Babies
programme.desc: We take a look at the new arrivals of zoological gardens and wildlife parks around the world, and watch the inventory at Germany's oldest zoo, where even notoriously difficult to manage camels have to be weighed and measured!

programme.title: Wild Asia
programme.desc: Tropical rainforests are one of the oldest habitats on the face of our earth – older than many of the stars.

programme.title: Bear Whisperer

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World
programme.desc: Mobsters, jazz, and turbulent economic times mark the 1920s. Silent film makes the transition to the talkies as sound comes to the silver screen. Criminals find that there's one less place to hide with the invention of the lie detector.

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World
programme.desc: Though overshadowed by the Great Depression, there is no shortage of ingenuity in the 1930s. The two-way radio gets miniaturized, and the world's first portable walkie-talkie goes on the air.

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World
programme.desc: War is the driving force behind much of the innovation in the 1940s. The microwave is born after a self-taught inventor realizes that military equipment is responsible for melting a chocolate bar in his pocket.

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World
programme.desc: The 1950s heralds the end of vacuum tubes and the rise of mobile technologies when two Japanese inventors shrink cabinet-size radios down to something small enough to fit in your pocket.

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World
programme.desc: The 1960s is a decade of both cultural and technological change. Home entertainment goes from the kitchen table to the TV screen when the video game console is unveiled.

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World
programme.desc: The cell phone moves from the car console to the hand when an engineer is inspired by a science fiction series. The hybrid car is reborn as an answer to the concerns over fossil fuels.

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World
programme.desc: The 1980s launch an unprecedented technological age that will continue into the next century. DNA profiling begins changing crime scene investigations for all time.

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World
programme.desc: A new telescope named Hubble lets us see even further into the universe, revealing more of its majesty and mysteries. A young software engineer's wife gives birth to his daughter while he develops the camera phone in the waiting room.

programme.title: Becoming Evil: The Mafia
programme.desc: From bootlegs to urban battlefields this groundbreaking series traces the origin of the gangs that dominated criminal activities and invented their own codes of conduct. This episode journeys into the roots of organized crime.

programme.title: Becoming Evil: The Mafia
programme.desc: Meet the legendary figures of Atlantic City and the Boardwalk and discover how rum running and bootlegging built an empire.

programme.title: Becoming Evil: The Mafia

programme.title: Dynasties: The Families That Changed the World
programme.desc: Nothing and everything is personal in business dynasties. Families are bound together or pushed apart as patriarchs and matriarchs lead the way, or let others take the fall.

programme.title: Dynasties: The Families That Changed the World
programme.desc: Fame can break down barriers. It can transcend culture and race. Death is never the end, so long as there is money to be made.

programme.title: Dynasties: The Families That Changed the World

programme.title: The Reading
programme.desc: After a deadly home invasion, Emma (Mo'Nique Hicks) copes by writing a book, but when a young psychic and her team perform a reading in her home, a new terror is unleashed.

programme.title: I Shouldn't Be Alive
programme.desc: Private plane crashes in the Kalahari Desert. Two of the surviving passengers decide to leave their injured party behind without food or water in order to find help.

programme.title: I Shouldn't Be Alive

programme.desc: An off-duty ER physician diagnoses his own critical illness while en route to the hospital; a visiting ER doctor is threatened while working at a remote hospital; a patient with ominous symptoms returns to the ER multiple times after a scuba diving trip.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Creepy Crawlies
programme.desc: A young woman is rushed to the ER after being bitten in the face by a dog; an ER doctor has to overcome his fears when he's confronted with an unusual series of patients; an intoxicated woman injured in a fall unexpectedly goes into cardiac arrest.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Frozen
programme.desc: Doctors struggle to save a young man brought to the ER frozen and pulseless; a man gets deathly ill while attending his own anniversary party; an embarrassing hidden secret prohibits a heart attack patient from being rushed to the OR for surgery.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It
programme.desc: A convicted contract killer spent 19 years in prison planning his escape.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It

programme.title: Alive
programme.desc: A super tornado cuts a swath through Joplin, Missouri heading directly for a hospital.

programme.desc: Hopeful college student succumbs to reckless alcohol abuse while coping with "survivor's guilt.

programme.title: Intervention
programme.desc: Alyson, a three-time White House intern and an award-winning student, met a boy in college who initiated her into drugs. She is addicted to morphine and crack and has returned to live with her parents.

programme.title: Intervention

programme.desc: Parents and friends intervene to save Alissa, a compulsive gambler who has lost more than $30,000 on 25-cent slots.

programme.title: Intervention

programme.title: Secrets of War

programme.title: Secrets of War

programme.title: Secrets of War

programme.title: Secrets of War

programme.title: Hitler's Most Wanted

programme.title: Hitler's Most Wanted

programme.title: Hitler's Most Wanted
programme.desc: Retracing the story of Hermann Goering, James learns how a revered fighter pilot of the First World War could emerge as a psychopathic war criminal in the Second World War.

programme.title: Hitler's Most Wanted

programme.title: World War II: The Last Heroes
programme.desc: Hitler orders a massive counter-attack in an attempt to cut the Allies in two. But British and Canadian forces press in on Germans forces from the North, while American troops close in from the South.

programme.title: World War II: The Last Heroes
programme.desc: Seizing the Scheldt Estuary fell to the Canadians who fought a victorious battle through mud, minefields, and canals to secure the critical shipping supply route to the Allied troops waiting in Antwerp.

programme.title: Secrets of War
programme.desc: Learn more about the Nazis and their heavily organized plunder of these riches that would ultimately become the most gigantic heist in history.

programme.title: Secrets of War

programme.title: Boogeymen
